about_the_product.title: Xtender | Premium E-ATX PC Case
about_the_product.description: Xtend your Cooling The Xtender is a high-airflow panorama case for maximum air circulation. Five pre-installed fans ensure efficient cooling even for high-performance components. Compatibility for 120 or 140 mm Fans Modular, removable fan brackets for installing 140 mm fans at the top or on the side. 2x P12 Pro A-RGB Fans pre-installed at Rear and 3x P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB Fans pre-installed at side Supports Two 420 mm Radiators Supports two 420, 360, 280 or 240 mm radiators for high-performance AIOs and custom loops. Magnetic Mesh Filters Easily removable, reinforced filters protect against dust and allow quick cleaning. Functional I/O Panel No frills. Only the most important and frequently used ports are included. Tempered Glass Side Panels Large tempered glass windows provide a clear view of the hardware. A-RGB PSU Cover Integrated glass panel with 24 A-RGB LEDs illuminates the lower section of the case. Flexible Mounting for Up to Six Drives Supports three 2.5" drives behind the motherboard tray. Removable drive cage holds two 3.5"/2.5" and one additional 2.5" drive. Includes Accessory Box Includes extra screws, cable ties and space for additional small parts. 3D Cable Pass Throughs for Improved Aesthetics For clean cable routing behind the motherboard and a tidy interior. Clean Cable Management Smart cutouts and optimally placed cable straps for easy cable management.

features.title: Drive Bay Count
features.value: 1x 2.5" (in the removable drive cage), 2x 3.5", 3x 2.5" (behind the motherboard tray)

features.title: Mounting Locations
features.value: Behind the Mainboard Tray, HDD Cage

features.title: I<wbr>/<wbr>O Ports
features.value: 2x USB-A (USB 3.2 Gen1x1 - 5 Gbps), 3.5 mm Jack (Line-In/Out), USB-C (USB 3.2 Gen2x1 - 10 Gbps)

features.title: Component Clearance
features.value: 200 mm (PSU with HDD Cage), 318 mm (PSU), 337 mm (GPU with Side Radiator), 482 mm (GPU)

features.title: Included Fans
features.value: 2x P12 Pro A-RGB fans (pre-installed at rear), 3x P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB fans (pre-installed at side), Five pre-installed fans

features.title: Fan Speed
features.value: 400–2650 rpm (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB), 600–3000 rpm (P12 Pro A-RGB)

features.title: Cooling Static Pressure
features.value: 5.1 mmH₂O (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB), 6.9 mmH₂O (P12 Pro A-RGB)

features.title: Cable Management
features.value: 35 mm (Cable Management Space), 3D Cable Pass-Throughs, Clean Cable Management

features.title: Design Highlights
features.value: Included A-RGB Fans, Tempered Glass Panel, Vertical GPU Mounting Kit

features.title: Power Connector
features.value: 3-Pin A-RGB Plug + Socket (PSU RGB Stripe), 4-Pin Fan Plug + Socket (P12 Pro A-RGB), 4-Pin Fan Plug + Socket (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB)

features.title: Voltage
features.value: 12 V DC (P12 Pro A-RGB), 12 V DC (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB), 5 V DC (PSU RGB Stripe)

features.title: Current
features.value: 0.33 A (P12 Pro A-RGB), 0.40 A (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB), 0.89 A (PSU RGB Stripe)

features.title: Lighting Highlights
features.value: 12 x A-RGB Gen 2 LED (P14 Pro Reverse A-RGB fan), 12x A-RGB Gen 2 LEDs (P12 Pro A-RGB fan), 24 A-RGB LEDs (Integrated glass panel)

features.title: Highlighted Features
features.value: Cable routing channels, PSU shroud, Vertical GPU mount

pros: Consumer friendly attitude to warranty and support
items.title: So Arctic Built a PC Case - Xtender VG Review
I've waited a long time for this PC case and it's proven an absolute stunner

user_reviews.title: Great case to build in!
user_reviews.text: Great case to build in due to its size, 5 included fans are good value (if purchased separately they'd be north of £100) the vertical GPU mount can be fiddly depending on what card you're using, my card had to be fitted with the mount removed from the case as there was no way to get a screwdriver to the screws to secure the card in the mount once in the case. Also the tint on the glass is very dark and makes it difficult/impossible to see your components, my motherboard and GPU don't have any RGB and are completely invisible on my build (Black version) however you don't have this issue with the White and mirror black versions. Overall keeps my system very cool and quiet.

Product Quality:Excellent
Performance:All the bells and whistles
Best Feature:Fits the biggest Liquid Cooler in the market
